domain: silver niello inlay (engrave channels in silver surface, fuse black Ag-Cu-Pb-S sulfide alloy filler with flux+heat, scrape excess, polish; high-contrast inlay structurally bonded to host metal)
specific_mechanism: Subtractive removal of host material along designed pattern, followed by contrasting-material filling, fused chemically; final scrape+polish. Pattern is anchored both mechanically (channel walls) and chemically (alloy fusion).
llm_application: Niello-style contrastive subspace inlay (NSCI): (1) ENGRAVE = identify unsafe-content subspace via probing; project away top-k principal components in residual. (2) FILL = small rank-8 niello-filler module generates contrasting safe-axis vector specifically tailored to fill the carved subspace, fused with learnable flux-coefficient. (3) POLISH = activation re-normalization. Subspace surgery + contrastive fill instead of gradient adjustment.
novelty_claim: LOL (2408.08769) contrastive decoding across layers, not subspace surgery. Layer-Aware Embedding Fusion (2504.05764) is layer-selection fusion. FtZ (2509.00664) is encoder-fusion via cross-attention. None retrieve a subtractive-then-contrast-fill residual subspace surgery for safety alignment.
